name: 𝙱𝙰𝚁𝙾𝚀𝚄𝙴 𝚆𝙾𝚁𝙺𝚂
description:
Captured by Baroque Works!

You were in Alabasta with the Strawhats to help Vivi and get kidnapped by a... swan?!.. and you wake up inside a room with three people staring at you, your wanted poster on the nearby table, and a familiar figure entering the room..

Guess who's back?!.. (me! SHADZ!!)

I had a dream of something similar to this scenario, so I thought I could make it a bot! XP (My love for Sir Crocodile is too much, and my other faves Bon-chan and Nico Robin ;)

I'm sorry if it gets really freaky or anything! It happened while I was testing and I tried to fix it and hopefully they don't mess up each other's character traits either, let me know if it has any mistakes, I will try and fix it!

FOLLOW FOR MORE!!

#Follower'sGiveMotivation #Caught #Captured

MY SPOTIFY: If you want to find my official Baroque Works Playlist Find it here!!!! https://open.spotify.com/user/317eyfwc5vmqbvhrdz64xyvywgd4si=89ce6ee01198490a
